emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Congratulations Sally, I just saw the announcement and wanted to offer my comgratualtions. I think that's great. I have always admired your leadership and clear thinking. I'm glad Enron recognizes your contributions. Patty

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations
emails.body: Re: Congratulations Thanks for your nice note. I hope that within my team that they see the promotion as an indication that the work that we do is recognized as meaningful. All of that helps me in recruiting and retaining talented people that make my job easier and more fun! Patricia A Lee@EES 01/16/2001 08:11 AM
